summary:
Claim: Catalan’s appliance is constructed on the lower anterior teeth with an inclined plane.  
Evidence: - The appliance uses a curved wire applied directly over the lower anterior teeth. - Its design includes an inclined plane oriented toward the maxillary molars to influence dental alignment.  
Answer: B
